dispatches.task: Execute comprehensive test campaign for staticdatagen v0.0.7 including unit tests, integration tests, and benchmark validation
Security audit for staticdatagen v0.0.7 focusing on input validation, path sanitization, and dependency vulnerabilities
Verify documentation consistency and completeness for staticdatagen v0.0.7 release including README, CHANGELOG, and API docs
dispatches.verify_cmd: cargo doc --all-features --no-deps && test -f README.md && test -f CHANGELOG.md

dispatches.task: Performance validation for staticdatagen v0.0.7 including benchmark regression testing and binary size analysis
dispatches.verify_cmd: cargo bench && cargo build --release && ls -la target/release/
